name: Senior Interview Coach вЂ” Task 3 Old

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO app.learning_materials (chat_id, url, title, content, summary_json, difficulty)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.chat_id }},
  '{{ $json.url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.summary_json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.difficulty }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (chat_id, url) DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  summary_json = EXCLUDED.summary_json,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty,
  added_at = now()
RETURNING id, chat_id, url, title, summary_json, difficulty;
SELECT id, title, difficulty FROM app.learning_materials WHERE chat_id = $1 ORDER BY added_at DESC LIMIT 20;

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  "max_tokens": 3500,
  "system": "You are the Examiner in an AI-powered learning assistant for senior backend engineers preparing for staff-tier interviews. Given a material title, summary, and full content, generate EXACTLY 5 multiple-choice questions that probe whether the reader internalized the material at senior interview level.

STYLE non-negotiable:
1. NO trivia. No year/acronym recall.
2. PROBE understanding: apply concept to scenario, compare approaches, identify failure mode, spot what breaks if assumption changes.
3. INTERVIEW FRAMING: phrase as interviewer would speak it.
4. PLAUSIBLE DISTRACTORS: wrong options represent real misconceptions.
5. ONE CORRECT ANSWER each (single best answer).
6. EXPLANATIONS MUST TEACH why right is right AND why distractors are wrong.
7. NO HARDCODING.

Output JSON with EXACTLY this schema:
{
  "questions": [
    { "id": "Q1", "question": "<=280 chars", "options": { "A": "<=120", "B": "<=120", "C": "<=120", "D": "<=120" }, "correctAnswer": "A"|"B"|"C"|"D", "explanation": "<2-4 sentences>" }, ...Q2-Q5
  ]
}

Exactly 5 questions, IDs Q1-Q5, 4 options A-D each, correctAnswer single A-D letter. Distribute correct answers across A/B/C/D.

Output ONLY the JSON. No fences, no commentary.",
  "messages": [
    { "role": "user", "content": {{ JSON.stringify("TITLE: " + $json.title + "
DIFFICULTY: " + $json.difficulty + "

KEY POINTS:
" + ($json.summary_json.key_points || []).join("
") + "

CONCEPTS: " + ($json.summary_json.main_concepts || []).join(", ") + "

FULL CONTENT:
" + $json.content) }} }
  ]
}

parameters.query: SELECT id, material_id, chat_id, questions, started_at, finished_at FROM app.quizzes WHERE id = $1;

INSERT INTO app.quiz_answers (quiz_id, question_id, user_answer, correct)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
ON CONFLICT (quiz_id, question_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

WITH agg AS (
  SELECT quiz_id,
         ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*))::INT AS score_pct
  FROM app.quiz_answers
  WHERE quiz_id = $1
  GROUP BY quiz_id
)
UPDATE app.quizzes q
SET finished_at = now(), score_pct = agg.score_pct
FROM agg
WHERE q.id = agg.quiz_id
RETURNING q.id, q.score_pct;
SELECT qa.question_id, qa.user_answer, qa.correct, q.questions FROM app.quiz_answers qa JOIN app.quizzes q ON q.id = qa.quiz_id WHERE qa.quiz_id = $1 ORDER BY qa.question_id;

SELECT materials_count, quizzes_taken, COALESCE(avg_score_pct, 0) AS avg_score_pct, last_quiz_at, advanced_materials, intermediate_materials, beginner_materials FROM app.v_user_stats WHERE chat_id = $1;

parameters.text:
рџ¤” I don't recognise that command.

Try: /start, /learn <url>, /quiz, /stats

рџ‘‹ *Welcome to Senior Interview Coach!*

I'm an AI-powered learning bot for senior backend interview prep вЂ” built on n8n + Claude (Opus 4.7 Teacher, Haiku 4.5 Examiner).

*What I can do:*

рџ“љ `/learn <url>` вЂ” submit any article / docs / blog post URL в†’ I'll extract the content and produce a structured summary (5-7 key points + main concepts + difficulty) calibrated to the senior backend bar.

рџЋЇ `/quiz` вЂ” pick from your saved materials в†’ I'll generate 5 interview-style multiple-choice questions specific to that material, with intelligent answer validation and explanations.

рџ“Љ `/stats` вЂ” see your learning dashboard (materials, quizzes taken, average score, weak topics).

*Try me right now:*
`/learn https://martinfowler.com/articles/microservices.html`

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "chat_id": {{ $json.chat_id }}, "text": "🔍 Reading the article and asking the Teacher (Claude Opus 4.7) to distill it at senior level... typically 30-60 seconds." }
